use_cases: Primary action buttons in web applications
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and includes keyboard accessibility with focus-visible ring states. Designed as an atomic UI building block for any Tailwind CSS application.
